chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Hafs Ibn Salim

text: ه عن حفص بن سالم فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن سعد ابن عبد اللّه، عن محمّد بن الحسين بن أبي الخطّاب، عن جعفر بن بشير، عن حمّاد بن عثمان، عن حفص أبي ولّاد بن سالم الكوفيّ و هو مولى‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Hafs ibn Salim has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Sa'd ibn Abdullah, from Muhammad ibn Al-Husayn ibn Abi Al-Khattab, from Ja'far ibn Bashir, from Hammad ibn 'Uthman, from Hafs Abu Wallad ibn Salim Al-Kufi, who was a freed servant (mawla).
